description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and large, evenly spaced windows along its exterior walls. The front facade is defined by a prominent central staircase leading to a main entryway, flanked by tall windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house includes multiple rooms arranged around a central corridor, with open-plan living spaces and private bedrooms. At the rear, there is a landscaped outdoor area bordered by a low wall and populated with lush green trees and flowering shrubs, providing a private garden or patio. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes symmetry, openness, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a central staircase entry, and a landscaped rear garden. The design is clean, symmetrical, and features open-plan interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry staircase, symmetrical window arrangement, and the full width of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, multiple rooms, and the rear garden area with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the landscaped garden, patio area, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the house's length, window placement, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase entry with wide steps, flanked by tall windows and a simple, modern door.
